steps.title: Use two points on the fit line
steps.content: The line of best fit falls from left to right, so the slope must be negative. Two visible points on the drawn line are approximately $(0,11.2)$ and $(8,4.5)$.

steps.title: Match the choices
steps.content: The closest listed value is $-0.84$. The positive $0.84$ has the wrong sign, and $\pm 11.19$ are far too steep for the drawn line. B is correct.
